title: Harder Dragon
description: Makes the ender dragon fight much harder by raising its HP and giving it increasing levels of resistance.
body:
# Harder Ender Dragon
Makes the fight harder by changing how much damage the dragon recieves and how much health it has in total.

**Base HP**: 200 -> 1000

### Resistance scaling:
- At 1000 HP:  Level 0
- At 700 HP:  Level 1
- At 400 HP:  Level 2
- At 100 HP:  Level 3
